37909.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
37909.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

37910.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
37910.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

37911.title: Anderson Cooper 360
37911.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

37912.title: Don Lemon Tonight
37912.description: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

37913.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
37913.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

37914.title: World Sport
37914.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

37921.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
37921.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

37924.description: Get a head start on what's moving the business agenda with Julia Chatterley live from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

37925.title: Connect the World
37925.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

37927.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

37928.description: An insider's look into the key stories of the week from John King and a group of America's top political reporters.

37929.description: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

37932.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

37933.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
